title: The 'Agentic Era' Replaces the 'Model Era' in AI
description: A definitive pivot in AI trajectory: transitioning from the 'Model Era' to the 'Agentic Era'. This marks a shift from focusing on model capabilities to focusing on autonomous agents that can perform complex tasks.
author: AI Daily Report

title: Hacker News: AI Made Writing Code Easier, Made Being an Engineer Harder
description: Hacker News discussion about how AI coding tools in 2026 are affecting the engineering profession. Community explores the paradox of easier coding but harder engineering challenges.
author: Hacker News Community

title: The Changelog: Adapting to an Agentic World
description: The Changelog podcast features Paul Dix discussing InfluxDB and 'adapting to an agentic world'. Episode covers AI coding agents on real-world side quests and how software development is evolving with AI agents.
author: Paul Dix

title: Docker EVP: The AI Era Demands an Era of Trust
description: Tushar Jain, Docker EVP of Engineering, discusses how 'The AI era demands an era of trust' on The Changelog podcast. Covers the implications of AI coding on software development practices and trust in AI-generated code.
author: Tushar Jain

title: Best AI Coding Assistants 2026: Claude Opus 4.5 at 96%+ Accuracy
description: Comprehensive comparison of AI coding assistants in 2026. Claude Opus 4.5 hits 96%+ accuracy for security-critical code, GitHub Copilot follows at 94%. Analysis covers Cursor, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, Tabnine, and Amazon Q Developer.
author: Multiple Sources

title: AI Coding Accelerates Development But DevOps Maturity Lags
description: Harness report reveals AI coding accelerates development pace, but teams experience more deployment risk, manual rework, and developer burnout. DevOps maturity isn't keeping pace with AI adoption in 2026.
author: Harness

title: 2026: The 'Slopacolypse' - AI Writing Most Code
description: Andrej Karpathy calls 2026 the 'Slopacolypse' - AI is suddenly writing most of his code. He admits to 'starting to atrophy' his ability to write manual code due to increased reliance on AI coding assistants. The shift is from 80% manual + 20% agents to significantly AI-driven coding.
author: Andrej Karpathy

title: Fireship: What Will AI Programming Look Like in 5 Years?
description: Fireship explores the future of AI programming with 1.3M views. Discusses realistic software goals for 2026, coding agents, and the evolution of development practices in an AI-first world.
author: Fireship

title: The State of AI Coding Agents (2026): From Pair Programming to Autonomous Teams
description: Major shift from AI 'autocomplete' tools to fully autonomous AI teams. Devin by Cognition described as the most autonomous coding agent with sandboxed cloud environment. Focus has shifted from assistance to autonomous execution.
author: Dave Patten

title: Top Open-Source Coding LLMs in 2026
description: moonshotai/Kimi-Dev-72B achieving 60.4% on SWE-bench, Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-480B as top open-source performer, and DeepSeek offering GPT-4 level performance at lower costs. Active benchmarking using LiveCodeBench and SWE-bench metrics.
author: Community
